message:
refactor(config): add command hooks system, strict TOML parsing, and project-aware config resolution

Command hooks infrastructure:
- Add CommandHookConfig type with event lifecycle hooks (pre/post-spawn,
  pre/post-send, pre/post-add, pre/post-create, pre/post-kill,
  pre/post-shutdown)
- Add CommandHookEvent enum, CommandHookDuration with time.ParseDuration
  support, and validation (max 10 minute timeout, non-empty command)
- Add ValidateCommandHooks() for batch validation

Strict TOML parsing:
- Switch project config loading from toml.Unmarshal to toml.Decode with
  MetaData inspection to detect and reject unknown/mistyped fields
- Add undecodedProjectConfigFields() helper for consistent field reporting

Project-aware config resolution:
- Update LoadMerged() to accept explicit cwd parameter instead of relying
  on implicit os.Getwd() calls deep in the call chain
- Update config.Watch() to accept cwd parameter and pass it through to
  LoadMerged() and FindProjectConfig()
- Update startup.SetConfigPath() to propagate the selected path to the
  NTM_CONFIG environment variable so DefaultPath() and other runtime
  helpers resolve consistently
- Add loadWithCWD() to config loader for explicit working directory support

Palette config improvements:
- Add findPaletteMarkdownForPathAndCWD() for config-path-aware palette
  discovery
- Add DetectPalettePathForConfigPathAndCWD() and
  DetectPalettePathForConfigPath() for explicit path resolution
- Refactor existing DetectPalettePath() and findPaletteMarkdown() as
  wrappers that use the new path-aware variants
- Add ResolveProjectPalettePath() for project config palette resolution

Scanner and config normalization:
- Add explicit go version format (1.25 -> 1.25.0) in go.mod

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
